'''âsh-z-j-m''' ('''kashazjemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beatbox|beatbox]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beatbox|beatbox]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-z-j-m
|-
! Lemma
| kashazjemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishazjemoko|thishazjemoko]] || [[word:jishazjemoko|jishazjemoko]] || [[word:shishazjemoko|shishazjemoko]] || [[word:kishazjemoko|kishazjemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushazjemoko|thuthushazjemoko]] || [[word:jujushazjemoko|jujushazjemoko]] || [[word:shushushazjemoko|shushushazjemoko]] || [[word:kukushazjemoko|kukushazjemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushazjemoko|thushazjemoko]] || [[word:jushazjemoko|jushazjemoko]] || [[word:shushazjemoko|shushazjemoko]] || [[word:kushazjemoko|kushazjemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshazjemoko|thoshazjemoko]] || [[word:joshazjemoko|joshazjemoko]] || [[word:shoshazjemoko|shoshazjemoko]] || [[word:koshazjemoko|koshazjemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshazjemoko|thĂŠshazjemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshazjemoko|jĂŠshazjemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshazjemoko|shĂŠshazjemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshazjemoko|kĂŠshazjemoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashazjemoko|thashazjemoko]] || [[word:jashazjemoko|jashazjemoko]] || [[word:shashazjemoko|shashazjemoko]] || [[word:kashazjemoko|kashazjemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
